reason_for_decision: The revised article clears the pass threshold with better bottleneck framing, clearer limits of software, and more practical prioritization logic.
strengths: The article now treats software-versus-hardware as a bottleneck diagnosis problem instead of a simplistic budget debate.
It states the limits of software clearly, which prevents the piece from drifting into vague software-first claims.
The prioritization sequence is concrete enough to support real project planning.
summary_assessment: This version passes because it moves beyond abstract comparison into practical investment logic. It is more disciplined and more useful than the original draft.
